title: About a Mass Production Eva Figure
display_title: About a Mass Production Eva Figure
wikitext:
[]: About a Mass Production Eva Figure             Quote Post by FrankEon » Tue Mar 14, 2017 1:08 pm Hi there everybody, new in posting, and im really sorry for my bad english (not my native language) i just wanted to ask if anybody knows about the value or details of this MPE toy that i just bought today for a very low price (25$ dollars) in a old store of the center of my city, the box and the toy seem to have a few years now.

[]: Re: About a Mass Production Eva Figure             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Fri Mar 31, 2017 4:58 pm Depends on who you ask I guess (original price was 3,800 yen by the looks of it, about 40 bucks), but know that these figures were notorious for arriving broken in the box (especially the translucent variants).

[]: Re: About a Mass Production Eva Figure             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 31, 2017 7:55 pm FrankEon wrote: i just bought today for a very low price (25$ dollars)
